item.title: Pakistan tells the world that they're victims of terrorism. Meanwhile Pak Army, Police and Govt officials attending the funeral of designated terrorists and their aids. Not to forget there military calls Osama a martyr. Troll India as much as you want but we're doing it right. ( video )
item.description: Pakistan tells the world that they're victims of terrorism. Meanwhile Pak Army, Police and Govt officials attending the funeral of designated terrorists and their aids. Not to forget there military calls Osama a martyr. Troll India as much as you want but we're doing it right.
